news_items.headline: The uneven cost of tariffs: Why some households will pay more than others
news_items.description: Households experience the financial cost of tariffs differently based on factors such as household size and consumption, economists said.

news_items.headline: 'This is insane.' Long lines plague U.S. airports as TSA officers face second missed paycheck in shutdown
news_items.description: The Trump administration said it plans to send ICE officers to help ease airport congestion amid TSA officer absences as they face second missed full paycheck.

news_items.headline: Bank of Korea's newly appointed chief pledges 'balanced' policy
news_items.description: Shin faces immediate challenges from Middle East-driven inflation and uneven growth.

news_items.headline: Trump threatens to deploy ICE agents to airports if DHS shutdown doesn't end, while Elon Musk offers to cover TSA agents' pay
news_items.description: President Trump claimed ICE agents handling airport security would arrest immigrants who are in the U.S. illegally.

news_items.headline: U.S. executives, from Apple to Eli Lilly, revamp their push into the world's second-largest economy at the China Development Forum
news_items.description: More than 80 global executives traveled to Beijing this weekend for the state-organized China Development Forum.

news_items.headline: CNBC Daily Open: Trump issues Strait of Hormuz ultimatum
news_items.description: U.S.-Iran threats over Hormuz rattle markets as oil risk lingers and missiles hit Israel, raising fears of a prolonged conflict.

news_items.headline: Not just buying 'things': Why China's emotional economy is on the rise
news_items.description: Amid a prolonged economic slowdown, one segment of the world's second-largest economy is growing quicker than the rest: China's so-called emotional economy.

news_items.headline: Iran war energy crisis is a renewable energy wake-up call
news_items.description: The Iran war is exposing how much the global economy still depends on fragile fossil fuel supplies. The conflict has virtually choked off the Strait of Hormuz, a vital shipping lane for a fifth of the world’s oil and liquefied natural gas. That's shaking up m…

news_items.headline: The economy has a Strait of Hormuz deadline for Trump: Two weeks
news_items.description: Corporate executives are not panicking over a short-term increase in oil prices and Strait of Hormuz closure, but patience may wear thin in a matter of weeks.
